This is the ai4X repository.

## Language Convention

- Conversation with the PO is in **German**.
- All artifacts (code, comments, documentation, commit messages, GitHub Issues, PRs) are in **English**.

**Before any work, read:**
1. `.github/agents/ai4x.agent.md` — Canonical Agent Definition (product scope, CLI model, explicitness rule).
2. `adm/gdl/index.yaml` — Canonical reading order and document metadata.

For specialist work, use the role-specific agent definitions in `.github/agents/*.agent.md`.
